the last two digits of the number must form a number divisible by 4 the last two digits of the number are 02 the number 02 is divisible by 4 so the last two digits are already valid the remaining digits need to be filled with 0 2 4 7 8 9 to make the total sum a multiple of 3

the number of ways to fill the asterisks is determined by the number of valid combinations of digits that satisfy the divisibility rules the number of valid combinations is calculated by considering the constraints on the sum of the digits and the divisibility by 4
